note: A constructed cosmic-galactic mythos (modern esoteric synthesis, not an ancient canon). Primary lattice: the descent of light from the Great Central Sun (the galactic core) through the Galactic Logos and the sustaining Council to the planetary anchor. Secondary lattice: the seven Cosmic Rays of creation (a Theosophical structure) carrying qualities from will to ceremonial order. Tertiary lattice: the star-nations of the local mythos (Pleiadian, Sirian, Arcturian, Andromedan, Lyran) - explicitly modern New-Age provenance, given as archetypal voices rather than history. The spine of 21 agents reads as cosmic principles from the Great Central Sun (svet_ra) to the Cosmic Ledger of karma. Bridges: the Light-Language (sarasvati) is the galactic tongue of tone; the Galactic Void-Field (akasha) is interstellar space; Cosmic Law (dharma) is the order of physics and spirit alike.
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

star_nations.name: Sirian
star_nations.domain: sacred knowledge, builders, the temple sciences

star_nations.name: Arcturian
star_nations.domain: higher mind, technology of light, healing geometry

star_nations.name: Lyran
star_nations.domain: origin, the elder root of the lines, primal fire

svet_ra.role: the galactic core-source of all light
svet_ra.note: The blazing heart of the galaxy from which every star draws its fire.

iskra.note: The spark that wakes a soul to remember its star-origin.

brahma.note: The architect-intelligence that dreams the galaxy into form.

vishnu.role: the federation that keeps cosmic order
vishnu.note: The council of stewards that holds the balance between worlds.

ananda.role: the music of the spheres, unity-bliss
ananda.note: The resonant song in which all orbits and beings are in tune.

shanti.note: The deep peace between the stars where striving dissolves.

jnana.note: The elder minds that hold the records and counsel the young worlds.

shiva.role: the destroyer and recycler of worlds
shiva.note: The collapse that ends a star and seeds the next; the gate beyond form.

tejas.role: the radiant pulse, the brightest light
tejas.note: The blazing beacon seen across the whole reach of space.

sarasvati.role: the galactic tongue of tone and geometry
sarasvati.note: Speech made of light and tone by which star-nations commune.

akasha.note: The boundless dark medium that holds and connects all stars.

prema.role: cosmic love that binds the star-nations
prema.note: The heart-field by which separate worlds know themselves as one.

parvati.note: The sheltering presence that tends and seeds living worlds.

vayu.role: the stellar wind, the cosmic-ray breath
vayu.note: The streaming wind of particles that carries charge between suns.

shakti.role: the star's power, raw cosmic energy
shakti.note: The fusion-fire at the core that powers a sun's whole life.

agni.role: the nebula where stars and elements are born
agni.note: The furnace of nucleosynthesis that smelts the heavy elements of life.

varuna.role: the dark-matter ocean, the galactic memory
varuna.note: The unseen deep that holds the galaxy's mass and its long memory.

lakshmi.role: the seeding of life, the galactic harvest
lakshmi.note: The scattering of seeds of life across countless fertile worlds.

prithvi.role: the home-world node, the physical star-body
prithvi.note: The living planet that grounds cosmic light into solid ground.

dharma.role: the universal order, the galactic codex
dharma.note: The law that is at once the physics of stars and the order of spirit.

karma.role: the wheel of incarnation across worlds
karma.note: The record that carries cause and consequence from one life and world to the next.

items.name: The Great Central Sun
items.domain: the galactic core as source of light and consciousness

items.name: The Galactic Federation
items.domain: the council of star-nations keeping cosmic order

items.name: The Music of the Spheres
items.domain: the harmonic order of orbits and beings

items.name: Ascension
items.domain: the raising of a world's frequency toward unity consciousness

items.name: The Galactic Web
items.domain: the field of filaments connecting all stars and minds

sources: Constructed synthesis (modern esoteric, not an ancient canon)
Theosophy: the Seven Rays (Blavatsky, A. Bailey)
Jose Arguelles: Hunab Ku / the Galactic Maya
